description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring a mix of light gray concrete and dark wood paneling on the exterior. The front includes a covered carport and a recessed entryway, while the rear opens to a spacious patio with a pergola and a rectangular swimming pool. Large, rectangular windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light to the interior. A prominent exterior staircase leads to the upper level, connecting to a rooftop terrace. The landscaping includes patches of green lawn and paved walkways surrounding the structure. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing clean lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, a mix of concrete and wood finishes, large windows, a carport, and a backyard pool with a pergola.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport, main entryway, and a mix of concrete and wood paneling.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the exterior staircase, rooftop terrace, and rear patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the backyard pool, pergola-covered patio, and large windows overlooking the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the garage, driveway, and a portion of the backyard with green lawn patches.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a flat overhang, adjacent to a covered carport, minimal decorative elements
